title: List of vendors for migratory bird hunting permits - Canada.ca
content:
## Where to buy a migratory game bird hunting permit
You can purchase your Migratory game bird hunting (MGBH) permit online or at the physical locations

## Three ways to purchase MGBH permit

### Option 1. You can purchase your MGBH permit online

### Option 2. You can purchase your MGBH permit at select Canada Post outlets

### Option 3. Or you can purchase your MGBH permit at the following independent vendors
Simply type the independent vendor's name, city, province or territory into the Filter items textbox below, and the independent vendor(s) will be shown in the filtered result in the table.
- Type " Alberta ", the table would shown all independent vendors in Alberta
- Type " Winnipeg ", the table would shown all independent vendors in Winnipag
- Type " Sport ", the table would shown independent vendors' with the name included the word "sport"
We currently have independent vendors selling MGBH permits in 7 provinces (including Alberta , British Columbia , Manitoba , New Brunswick , Ontario , Prince Edward Island and Saskatchewan ).
